description_long: This object is a cluster of delicate pink flowers with soft, overlapping petals that display subtle gradients of white and darker pink near the edges. The petals are broad and slightly ruffled, giving the flower a lush, full appearance. Green sepals and hints of foliage are visible at the base, providing a natural contrast to the vibrant pink hues. Two slender, pale green stems support the blossoms, and the flowers appear to be freshly bloomed. The overall structure is organic and natural, with a slight asymmetry typical of real flowers. The surface of the petals appears soft and slightly matte, with gentle undulations and a natural, velvety texture.
description: A cluster of lush pink flowers with ruffled petals and green stems, displaying a soft, natural appearance. The petals are broad, overlapping, and subtly shaded with gradients of pink and white.
description_view_0: This view highlights the full, open faces of the pink flowers, showing the overlapping petals and some green foliage at the base.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the slender stems supporting the blossoms and the profile of the petals, emphasizing the flower's three-dimensional structure.
description_view_2: From this angle, the stems are more prominent, and the underside of the petals is visible, showing the layering and attachment to the stem.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the front-facing petals, with the ruffled edges and color gradients most visible, and less of the stem is seen.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled configuration, overlapping each other in a circular pattern around the center, with some slight asymmetry and layering typical of many ornamental flowers.
